Motion To Compel Plntf. Tom Gray'S Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff must respond to this separate form of discovery. As the documents previously have been produced and bate stamped, the responses may make reference to the bate stamped documents. However, the objections to the interrogatories as harassment are improper. Plaintiff shall respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT
